programme.desc: News and current affairs promoting a greater awareness and international understanding of Korea.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Dr. Ramoray Dies
programme.desc: Joey is finding success in playing Dr. Drake Ramoray on TV series 'Days of Our Lives'. He even has an interview published in TV magazine. Unfortunately, he also makes the mistake of telling the journalist he made up most of his own lines for the show.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Curse of the Bambino
programme.desc: Carl convinces Mike to go with him to see his psychic, and Peggy drags Molly to her church to pray for something they've all been waiting for.

programme.title: Mom: A Safe Word and a Rib Eye
programme.desc: Christy feels left out when Bonnie and the ladies keep Jill's pregnancy a secret.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Working for Caligula
programme.desc: Now that newlywed Alan has moved out, Charlie returns to his bachelor lifestyle.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Christmas in Theater Eight
programme.desc: The Johnsons have a tradition of going to the movies on Christmas and they can never agree on what to see. Dre wants to see an important film about Rosa Parks, but they all want to see the latest action-packed superhero blockbuster.

programme.title: The Flash: Death of the Speed Force
programme.desc: Kid Flash returns to Central City with new tricks up his sleeve. Wally confides to Barry that he returned because he thinks there is something wrong with the speed force. Meanwhile, Cisco returns from his fact-finding mission across Earth-Prime.

programme.title: DC's Legends of Tomorrow: Mr. Parker's Cul-de-Sac
programme.desc: Ray plans a date night for him and Nora. Ava learns what Sara was really doing while she was away. Charlie and Constantine make a deal to work together. Rory is upset when he gets negative comments about his book, so Zari helps track down the critic.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Unagi
programme.desc: Chandler tries to think of a homemade Valentine's Day present for Monica, and Ross tries to give Rachel and Phoebe lessons in Unagi instead of paying for self-defence classes.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Abstinence
programme.desc: George is forced to abstain from sex when his girlfriend develops mononucleosis and soon discovers that his mind is sharper. Kramer transforms his apartment into a smoking lounge.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mike and Molly encounter many speed bumps before they can finally make the trip down the aisle on their wedding day.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Who Is This Vod Kanockers?
programme.desc: Alan feels guilty when he learns that Charlie and Mia didn't tie the knot because she had wanted him and Jake to move out. Meanwhile, Charlie and his rock star neighbour don't get along.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Deadheads
programme.desc: Barry feels threatened when school deadhead Matt starts hanging out with the JTP and soon finds himself kicked out of the group when he becomes too controlling. Back at home, Adam uses a curse word which sends Beverly into a tail spin.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Mama Drama
programme.desc: Adam's desire to be the lead in the school musical "Jesus Christ Superstar" goes unfulfilled when he's cast in something other than the leading role. Insistent that her son is a star, Beverly casts Adam in a rival show, but he becomes too self-obsessed.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Planes, Fingers and Automobiles
programme.desc: When Max decides to head to Los Angeles to win back Randy, she and Caroline embark on a cross-country road trip with Han at the wheel. Also, while Han and the girls are away, Oleg takes charge of the diner and Sophie fills in as a waitress.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: The Side Part, Under Episode
programme.desc: Throwing herself in her work at the hospital, Melanie meets her very own McHottie.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Breaking Curfew
programme.desc: When Mike catches Mandy sneaking into the house late one night after being with Kyle, he wages his own form of psychological warfare on the couple to prevent it from happening again.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackée Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Colvin-Williams vs. Williams
programme.desc: A woman suspects her taxi-driver husband is picking up more than fares when he’s away from home.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Dirty Sale/ Date Fright
programme.desc: The appraised value of a guitar is disputed; a sorority formal doesn’t go as planned.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Brick in the Glass
programme.desc: A new salon owner accuses her former boss of vandalism.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Williams/ Mayberry vs. Winn
programme.desc: A woman has no recollection of her sexual history with the man claiming to have fathered her 35-year old daughter.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: If I Need Help
programme.desc: The plaintiff sues an elderly care facility.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Let Me Have My Hos
programme.desc: Today, what had Keondra at a boiling point in her relationship with her boyfriend J.R.? She suspects that he’s doing the unthinkable and cheating on her with a woman named Krissie.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her younger, cheating ex-boyfriend for an unpaid loan, but he claims they were only friends with benefits and he made payment arrangements that she refused to accept.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include: Taking It Out On An Ex, Refusing A Ring Return and Hitting A Woman Where It Hurts.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'Not Getting Along' and 'Making Things Up.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: We Don't Want Your Furniture/ ATV Tree
programme.desc: Disagreement over unpaid rent and furniture; an ATV causes damage to a special site.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: The plaintiff says she was struck by the defendant, resulting in car damages and medical expenses; the defendants say it was another car's fault. Then, dancing partners are in a legal batter over unpaid airfare, lodging, and a ticket for a cruise.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did My Boyfriend Abuse my Daughter?
programme.desc: Chevelle is suspicious that her boyfriend Edwin had molested her youngest daughter but Edwin is desperate to prove his innocence; then Savana was shocked that her boyfriend burned her two-year-old daughter but he claims it was accidental.

programme.title: Maury: Mom ... DNA Will Prove I Had a Secret Baby With Your Husband
programme.desc: Ontario is the only man Nana's been with. Ontario's friend says otherwise, and that her baby isn't his. Dawn and Dakota are back; Dakota fears Dawn is cheating and he's not the father of her babies. Tywrell may be the father of his wife's daughter's baby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Take My Lesbian V-Card
programme.desc: Ronnie is ready to pop the question to his true love Keonda. However Ronnie’s good friend Kwae has a shocking revelation that could quell any plans for a wedding.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: No B.S. Guide to Creating Boundaries
programme.desc: Mel explains how to protect your feelings, set boundaries and stop people from walking all over you.

programme.title: Movie: In a World ...
programme.desc: A woman finds herself competing against her own father in the movie trailer voice-over profession.

programme.title: Movie: Punch Drunk Love
programme.desc: A beleaguered small-business owner embarks on a romantic journey with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Movie: Shaft
programme.desc: A cybersecurity expert investigates his friend's suspicious death.

programme.title: Movie: A Thousand Words
programme.desc: After an encounter with a spiritual guru, a literary agent finds an odd tree in his yard that loses a leaf each time the agent speaks.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Movie: Scary Movie 3
programme.desc: A girl investigates crop circles and video tapes while preventing an alien invasion.

programme.title: Movie: She's Funny That Way
programme.desc: A married Broadway director solicits a young prostitute who dreams of becoming an actress. Not only does she land a role in his latest play, but she'll be acting alongside his wife, the star of the show.

programme.title: Movie: The Ringer
programme.desc: In order to slide out from beneath a mound of debt, a nice young man decides to rig the Special Olympics by posing as a contestant.

programme.title: Movie: A Handful of Dust

programme.title: Movie: Everybody Wants to Be Italian
programme.desc: A man and a woman pretend to be Italian to win each other's affection.

programme.title: Movie: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Four friends face the promise and pitfalls of life in the 1990s when they share a house.

programme.title: Movie: Happy Death Day
programme.desc: After the queen bee of a college sorority is murdered on her birthday, she wakes up again that same morning and is forced to relive the same day over and over again. Determined to break the cycle, she tries to figure out who keeps killing her.

programme.title: Movie: Grandma's Boy
programme.desc: A 35-year-old man named Alex is forced to live with his grandmother after getting thrown out of his former place due to non-payment of rent.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
